---
title: "Advanced Pathway Materials"
---

Summer 2026 advanced pathway participants will use epidemic models as a context for learning how deterministic simulation, optimization, stochastic models, and Bayesian inference fit together.

## Daily Schedule

The daily schedule is the main entry point for workshop materials. Participant notebooks and solution notebooks are linked from each session.

[Open the daily schedule](../schedule/schedule_2026_advanced.qmd)
